payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of the upper front of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet showing a horizontal decorative molding and a recessed panel with a glossy finish and minor surface wear; appears close to the camera, approximately 1.0 m away.
